function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0008
alias: helios_backfill_rollout_week
issued_on: 2026-01-19
total_eur: 610
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: checklist rewrite and rollout pack
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 390
    line_eur: 390
  - item: staff follow-up support
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 110
    line_eur: 220
---
# Helios rollout week invoice

```text
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| field          | value                          |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                        |
| invoice_number | INV-0008                       |
| alias          | helios_backfill_rollout_week   |
| issued_on      | 2026-01-19                     |
| total_eur      | 610                            |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint         |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                 |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | checklist rewrite and rollout pack | 1   | 390      | 390      |
| 2 | staff follow-up support            | 2   | 110      | 220      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                              |     |          | 610      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A later invoice from the point where usable support mattered more than elegant process language.

next_step.current_state: Structured frontmatter write completed on the specified invoice and preserved original body text. Outbox reactive note is irrelevant here because no outbox file was written. Next required cleanup is deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Wrote YAML frontmatter to the target invoice file at the same path with extracted visible fields and line items.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: task asked to handle next inbox item by OCR-ing exactly one specified invoice file with YAML frontmatter per schema, preserving existing body, focused diff, then complete inbox handling. Done. Completeness: inbox listed one explicit file, and only that file was processed. Correct level: used invoice schema fields and line items from the note text. Numeric check: line totals 1*390=390 and 2*110=220; 390+220=610 matches total_eur 610.
next_step.observation: Deleted processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_next-task.md after successfully completing the requested structured-record update.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item successfully. I added YAML frontmatter to `50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md` using the finance invoice schema, extracted all visible fields and line items, preserved the original note body verbatim below the frontmatter, kept the diff focused, and then deleted the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read nested AGENTS files for entered folders, used workflow and schema docs before OCR/frontmatter migration, preserved original body per migration discipline, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly named one invoice file and asked for OCR into YAML frontmatter per schema while preserving the body. The target invoice contained all required schema fields and line items, enabling exact extraction without guessing. Update was applied at the same path, body retained verbatim, totals validated, and inbox item removed per inbox-processing workflow.
